title: Australian Potato Pancakes
description: A spicy take on traditional potato pancakes, inspired by Australian flavors. Crispy on the outside, fluffy on the inside.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together grated potatoes, chopped dill, and chili flakes.
In a separate bowl, mix together pancake mix and a splash of water to form a batter.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the potato mixture onto the pan.
Using a spatula, flatten the mixture slightly.
Cook for 3-4 minutes, until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
Optional: add a dollop of sour cream or a sprinkle of chopped herbs.
